author: ABC News YouTube
text:
A Girl Scout troop used profits to make a 3D-printed toddler mobility trainer
A Girl Scout troop in Dorchester, Massachusetts, used profits from its cookie sale proceeds to make a 3D-printed toddler mobility trainer, for children with mobility challenges.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Teen summer jobs hit historic lows, new data shows
As new data shows teen summer jobs hitting historic lows, MIT grad and content creator Gohar Khan joined ABC News Live to share resume, interviews and AI job search advice.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Iran peace talks continue after Trump threatens Oman & other trending stories | Searched
ABC News Live is breaking down the top stories trending today:
FBI finds 303 gold bars in home of ex-CIA employee who allegedly lied about his credentials.
President Trump threatens to "blow up" Oman as peace talks continue with Iran. 
Trump adviser Stephen Miller has testy exchange with DNC on X. 
Clothing brand Patagonia sues environmentalist drag queen Pattie Gonia for trademark infringement. 
Today is National Burger Day, and restaurant brands are running national promotions and deals. 
 
Watch ‘Searched’ weeknights at 4:30 p.m. ET on @ABCNewsLive.

text:
Baby deer rescued from flood waters in Indiana
A firefighter in Indiana plunged into rushing flood waters to rescue a baby deer who had gotten swept away by the current. The medics stepped in to help the fawn, who was safely take to an animal rescue.

text:
Cruise ship killing: Stepbrother can stay out of jail, judge rules
The 16-year-old boy accused of killing his stepsister on a cruise is allowed to stay out of jail with certain restrictions, a federal judge in Florida ruled.
 
ABC News’ Victor Oquendo breaks down the new alleged evidence that prosecutors have revealed.
